subcodes.first_line: O true friends and maidservants of the Lord! His honor Furúgh hath, in his letter, graciously mentioned each one of you [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران حقیقی و اماء ربانی جناب فروغ هر یک از شما را در نامه خویش ببزرگواری
subcodes.subjects: @humor; jokes, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @love and unity, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @music and singing, @praise and encouragement
